column1: # When workflow-COPYME-tree_visualization is copied to workflow-RUN_N-tree_visualization,
# this manifest travels with it and describes which terminal files from
# OUTPUT_pipeline/N-output/ get published to the server.
# The surrounding hierarchy (subproject / gene_family / step / workflow)
# is INFERRED from the manifest's location by RUN-update_upload_to_server.sh.
# You only describe files in this manifest.
# COLUMNS (TAB-separated — mind the tab count; header row REQUIRED):
#   source_path     Path to file(s). Relative to this manifest's directory.
#   dest_name       (optional) Override the filename in upload_to_server/.
#   display_label   (optional) Human-readable title shown in the web UI.
#   file_category   (optional) Grouping label. Files in the same category
#                   are grouped under the same subsection.
#                   Suggested: visualization, tree, alignment, summary, qc, log.
#   order           (optional) Integer sort key within category (default 100).

column6: Per-method render status and file list.
Present only if toytree rendering soft-failed.
